evidence_summary: [CH003_SC004] Purpose: Demonstrate the protagonist's unique advantage (agility) and resolve the immediate conflict through action.

[CH003_SC004] Summary: Facing certain death, the protagonist utilizes the low gravity to perform a massive thirty-foot leap over the incubator, escaping the spear's reach. The Martians observe this with curiosity rather than hostility.
[CH003_SC004] Coverage: Slow-motion or high-frame-rate shots of the leap. Extreme wide shots to capture the arc of the jump over the structure. Reaction shots from the Martians watching the feat.
[CH003_SC004] Continuity: The trajectory and landing point of the protagonist's leap; the proximity of the spear tip.
